title: DN14 7QH, Scutt's Eggs Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/KP3024LC/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits  that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit, decision document for:   Operator name: Scutt’s Eggs Limited Installation name: Owsthorpe Farm Permit number: EPR/KP3024LC/A001  "
